name: laboraid-dev-l3-sfn-main
definition: {"Comment": "Objective-driven: PLAN -> SYNTHESIZE(all docs, profile) -> SYNTH-PUBLISH(Aurora, cohorts) ", "StartAt": "Plan", "TimeoutSeconds": 3600, "States": {"Plan": {"Type": "Task", "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke", "Parameters": {"FunctionName": "arn:aws:lambda:us-east-2:908106425069:function:laboraid-dev-l4-fn-batch-planner", "Payload.$": "$"}, "ResultSelector": {"plan.$": "$.Payload"}, "OutputPath": "$.plan", "Retry": [{"ErrorEquals": ["Lambda.ServiceException", "Lambda.TooManyRequestsException", "States.TaskFailed"], "IntervalSeconds": 5, "MaxAttempts": 2, "BackoffRate": 2.0}], "Catch": [{"ErrorEquals": ["States.ALL"], "ResultPath": "$.error", "Next": "PipelineFailed"}], "Next": "Synthesize"}, "Synthesize": {"Type": "Task", "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke", "Parameters": {"FunctionName": "arn:aws:lambda:us-east-2:908106425069:function:laboraid-dev-l4-fn-synthesizer", "Payload.$": "$"}, "ResultSelector": {"out.$": "$.Payload"}, "OutputPath": "$.out", "Retry": [{"ErrorEquals": ["Lambda.ServiceException", "Lambda.TooManyRequestsException", "States.TaskFailed"], "IntervalSeconds": 5, "MaxAttempts": 2, "BackoffRate": 2.0}], "Catch": [{"ErrorEquals": ["States.ALL"], "ResultPath": "$.error", "Next": "PipelineFailed"}], "Next": "SynthPublish"}, "SynthPublish": {"Type": "Task", "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke", "Parameters": {"FunctionName": "arn:aws:lambda:us-east-2:908106425069:function:laboraid-dev-l4-fn-synth-publish", "Payload.$": "$"}, "ResultSelector": {"out.$": "$.Payload"}, "OutputPath": "$.out", "Retry": [{"ErrorEquals": ["Lambda.ServiceException", "Lambda.TooManyRequestsException", "States.TaskFailed"], "IntervalSeconds": 5, "MaxAttempts": 2, "BackoffRate": 2.0}], "Catch": [{"ErrorEquals": ["States.ALL"], "ResultPath": "$.error", "Next": "PipelineFailed"}], "Next": "Published"}, "Published": {"Type": "Succeed"}, "PipelineFailed": {"Type": "Fail"}}}
